expectations.text: Detects merged PR #8 and recommends skip rather than would-open

expectations.text: Ends with a structured per-repo summary

expectations.text: Did not perform any remote-mutating operations
expectations.evidence: Subagent ran read-only gh/git commands; report contains no push/PR commands. NOTE: subagent's Write tool was sandbox-blocked, requiring inline retrieval — but no remote mutation occurred.
